history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B, facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so I must not move forward. The safe path toward the goal at row 04 column D is to go down first, which means I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so moving forward brings me closer without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, but I then need to navigate around the lava at row 04 column C. First I should move forward into the safe cell below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D, which is to my right, but the cell directly ahead (row 05 column B) is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I should turn left to face right toward the open path and goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D, but there is lava at row 04 column C directly ahead, so I cannot move forward safely. I need to avoid the lava, so I will turn to look for a safe route around it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `G` is immediately to my right at row 04 column D, but there is lava at row 04 column C blocking a direct move. The safe route is to move upward into row 03 column B first.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column B, which is safe but moves away from the goal. To get closer to the goal, I should face right and move toward the open path on row 03.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column C, which is safe, and it moves me closer to the goal. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C facing right (`>`). The goal `G` is at row 04 column D, which is directly one step forward and appears safe from my current position. I will move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is directly below me at row 04 column D, but I am currently facing the wrong direction. To move toward the goal safely, I need to face down first.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal `G` is directly below me at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
